title: Old Vertical Bobbing
description: Makes the camera bob with vertical movement like it did before 1.14
body:
Before Minecraft 1.14, moving vertically (jumping, flying, falling, etc.) with View Bobbing enabled would make the camera tilt up or down. This mod returns this behavior to modern versions of Minecraft.

Showcase video:
